patch_analysis: [FileChange(file_path='server/src/main/java/io/crate/replication/logical/action/PublicationsStateAction.java', change_type='MODIFIED', added_lines=['import org.jetbrains.annotations.Nullable;', '/**', '* The action is registered as a proxy action,', '* thus a node may forward the request/response to/from its master node.', "* In such cases, the received metadata won't be upgraded,", '* and we cannot recreate this old payload using the new RelationMetadata.', '* The payload is then stored and send out as-is.', '*/', '@Nullable', 'private final Map<RelationName, RelationMetadata> relationsInPublications;', 'this.relationsInPublications = null;', 'this.relationsInPublications = relationsInPublications;', 'relationsInPublications = null;', 'Map<RelationName, RelationMetadata> relationsInPublications = this.relationsInPublications != null ?', 'this.relationsInPublications :'], removed_lines=['Map<RelationName, RelationMetadata> relationsInPublications ='], is_test_file=False, previous_file_path=None)]
